name: codex-orchestrator
description: MCP server that lets Claude orchestrate OpenAI Codex as a supervised implementation executor — checkpoint slices, server-enforced quality gates, persistent state.
author: Tom Werner

scripts.bundle: npm run bundle:server && npm run bundle:worker
scripts.bundle:server: esbuild src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=bundle/server.mjs --external:node:* --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.bundle:worker: esbuild src/worker/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=bundle/worker.mjs --external:node:* --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
